title: ACBN Newsletter #4 Jan-Jun 2022
author: Albert Duschl
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The forth ACBN Newsletter will include information about recent developments, highlights from the research performed in ACBN, introductions to new groups and faculty members, and other items. In this edition you will find: 

 
	 an excursion into our  history  
 

 
	 an introduction of the  Meisner-Kober  lab: Extracellular vesicles and RNA drugs 
 

 
	 Scientific Moving Stories.
